title: MoveHelper
description: Mod with function for singleplayer. Now have function AutoSprint, FastUp.
body:
MoveHelp is a utility mod designed to improve movement mechanics in singleplayer.

**Features:**

*   **AutoSprint:** Automatically sprints when moving forward. You don't need to hold the sprint key anymore.
*   **NoJumpDelay:** Removes the default cooldown between jumps. This allows you to jump immediately upon landing without waiting.
*   **FastUp:** Allows you to walk up full blocks instantly without pressing jump.
